title: piccolo-perf — DNS
description: DNS resolver latency and success rate per resolver and name

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_dns" and r._field == "dns_rtt_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.source + " → " + r["resolver"] + " (" + r["name"] + ")" }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_dns" and r._field == "dns_success")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 100.0, _field: r.source + " → " + r["resolver"] }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_dns" and r._field == "dns_success")
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 100.0, _field: r.source + " → " + r["resolver"] }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_dns" and r._field == "dns_rtt_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (tables=<-, column="_value") => tables |> quantile(q: 0.50), createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "p50 " + r["resolver"] }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_dns" and r._field == "dns_rtt_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (tables=<-, column="_value") => tables |> quantile(q: 0.95), createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "p95 " + r["resolver"] }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_dns" and r._field == "dns_rtt_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: (tables=<-, column="_value") => tables |> quantile(q: 0.99), createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "p99 " + r["resolver"] }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_dns" and r._field == "dns_rtt_ms")
  |> group(columns: ["source", "resolver", "name"])
  |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ count: accumulator.count + 1, sum: accumulator.sum + r._value, min: if r._value < accumulator.min then r._value else accumulator.min, max: if r._value > accumulator.max then r._value else accumulator.max }), identity: { count: 0, sum: 0.0, min: 99999.0, max: 0.0 })
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with mean: r.sum / float(v: r.count) }))
  |> keep(columns: ["source", "resolver", "name", "mean", "min", "max", "count"])
  |> rename(columns: { mean: "Avg RTT (ms)", min: "Min RTT (ms)", max: "Max RTT (ms)", count: "Samples" })
